description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 22, 2023 at 7:59 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger vehicle on West 7th Street at South Park View Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped for a red light facing southeast on West 7th Street at South Park View Street when a passenger vehicle 
approached from behind and made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
